info.title: Query Pipeline — API Gateway
info.description: Orchestrates the full NL→MongoDB→LLM pipeline. Accepts a natural language query, converts it to a MongoDB query via query-service, executes it, and returns a report or video prompt generated by llm-service.

post.description: Returns a JWT bearer token valid for the configured duration. The token is stored in MongoDB and invalidated automatically when it expires. Pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on all protected endpoints.

Receives a natural language input, orchestrates query-service to produce a MongoDB query, executes that query, then calls llm-service to generate either a structured markdown report or a video generation prompt.

get.description: Fetch a previously executed pipeline result from the MongoDB audit collection.

schema.title: Response Get Pipeline Api Pipeline  Pipeline Id  Get

get.description: Returns the operational status of the api-gateway and all downstream services.

post.summary: Ingest Instagram posts from JSON + zip of images
post.description: Accepts a multipart upload containing a JSON array of Instagram post objects and an optional zip archive of image files. Posts are upserted into instagram_posts: new posts are inserted, existing posts (matched by SHA-256 of URL) have only likesCount and commentsCount updated. Empty posts (missing url, ownerUsername, or timestamp) are filtered out. Images inside the zip are inserted into instagram_images only when their content SHA-256 is not already present. Files inside the zip that are not jpg/jpeg/png/webp are silently skipped.

400.description: Malformed JSON or invalid zip archive

post.summary: Ingest visual classifications from MLLM analysis
post.description: Accepts a JSON file produced by the MLLM visual analysis pipeline. For each entry with status 'ok', finds the matching embedded image in instagram_posts by post_id and image_index (parsed from image_path filename), then writes 'visual_classifications' and 'classification_model' onto that embedded image. Entries with status 'error' or unresolvable filenames are counted but not written.

400.description: Malformed JSON or missing required fields

get.summary: List image metadata for a post
get.description: Returns metadata for all embedded images of a post (filename, index, size, content_type, content_sha). Does not return the raw image bytes — use GET /api/posts/{post_id}/images/{index} to download a specific image.

schema.title: Response List Post Images Api Posts  Post Id  Images Get

get.description: Returns the raw image bytes with the correct Content-Type header. Use index=0 for single-image posts, index=1/2/3... for carousel images. The response can be used directly in an HTML img tag or saved to disk.

post.description: Accepts a ZIP archive containing the 5 Datappeal CSV files (POI_Data.csv, POI_Digital_Trace_Summarisation.csv, POI_OTA_Offers_Price.csv, POI_OTA_Offers_Saturation.csv, POI_Sentiment_Trend.csv) plus a segment identifier. Each POI is stored as a single document in poi_data with all time-series data embedded. Re-uploading the same segment replaces the embedded arrays cleanly (upsert by poi_id).

400.description: Invalid segment, missing CSV, or bad ZIP

post.summary: Ingest PAT Instagram posts from JSON + zip of images
post.description: Accepts a PAT name, a JSON array of Instagram post objects, and an optional zip of images. Posts are upserted into pat_posts with the pat_name field set. Deduplication and update logic is identical to /api/ingest/posts.

400.description: Malformed JSON or invalid zip archive

post.summary: Ingest MLLM image descriptions for PAT posts
post.description: Accepts an analysis_normalized.json produced by an MLLM pipeline. For each entry with status 'ok', finds the matching embedded image in pat_posts by post_id and image_index (parsed from image_path filename), then writes 'image_description' and 'description_model' onto that embedded image. Entries with status 'error' or unresolvable filenames are counted but not written.

400.description: Malformed JSON or missing required fields

get.summary: Export pipeline result as DOCX or PDF
get.description: Fetches a previously executed pipeline result and returns it as a formatted DOCX or PDF file. Markdown headings, lists, tables, and code blocks are rendered with proper styles.

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Export format — 'docx' for Word, 'pdf' for PDF
schema.title: Format

parameters.description: Export format — 'docx' for Word, 'pdf' for PDF

404.description: Pipeline ID not found or result is empty

post.summary: Generate InVideo link from pipeline video prompt
post.description: Reads the video prompt from a pipeline result, sends it to the InVideo MCP tool, and returns a URL that opens InVideo with the prompt pre-loaded.

400.description: Pipeline is not in video mode or result is empty

examples.result:
## Sommario

Sono stati trovati 12 post pubblicati il 18 maggio 2026 con almeno 5 mi piace...
